description_long: This is a modern electric kettle with a conical, slightly rounded body made of metallic material, likely stainless steel, with a subtle marbled texture. The kettle features a prominent, arched handle at the top, wrapped in a black, grippy material for heat protection and comfort. A short, angled spout extends from one side, designed for easy pouring, while a small, round, gold-colored knob sits atop a removable domed lid. The base is circular and black, likely an integrated heating plate, with a gold accent at the rear, possibly a switch or indicator. The overall design is sleek and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on utility.
description: A sleek, metallic electric kettle with a black arched handle, domed lid with gold knob, and a short angled spout. The body is subtly marbled and sits on a black circular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout, arched handle, domed lid with gold knob, and the marbled metallic body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle attachment, gold accent at the base, and the smooth, uninterrupted back surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spout visible on the right, handle arching above, and the gold knob on the lid.
description_view_3: Direct side view focusing on the spout opening, handle, and the gold-accented lid, with the base and body profile visible.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with gold knob
